title: pittosporum cravenianum
intro: Pittosporum cravenianum is a species of flowering plant in the family Pittosporaceae, native to Australia. It is also known as the Queensland almond or Craven's pittosporum. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be beneficial in treating various health issues such as skin infections and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Pittosporum cravenianum include infusions and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits, such as soothing coughs and relieving digestive issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
